meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve can't deploy apps (Advanced Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't deploy apps. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Starter Kits: Overcome Deployment Blocks for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with app deployment. Use this advanced guide to master SaaS starter kits with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship client projects faster.
content.answer_block: Deploying apps shouldn't be a bottleneck. By leveraging a production-ready SaaS starter kit, you eliminate infrastructure friction, authentication headaches, and database boilerplate. Combine this with Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for automated logic implementation, allowing you to focus purely on high-value client features instead of configuration.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client is waiting, and your codebase is stuck in a 'works on my machine' purgatory. You’ve spent three days wrestling with CI/CD pipelines and environment variables instead of building the features that actually get you paid. This is the silent killer of every freelance career: the deployment drag.

But the era of manual infrastructure setup is dead. The most efficient builders are no longer writing boilerplate; they are orchestrating pre-validated stacks that deploy to global edges in seconds. By adopting a hardened SaaS starter kit, you transform your workflow from a manual grind into a high-velocity, automated machine.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize your project using a battle-tested SaaS starter kit to ensure your authentication and database schema are production-grade from minute one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a robust SaaS boilerplate with Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe integration. Ensure strict TypeScript typing and modular architecture for future-proofing.

steps.title: Automate Database Migrations
steps.description: Stop manual SQL tweaking. Use Claude Code to generate and verify your database schema changes based on your core business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a migration script for a multi-tenant subscription model. Include policies for Row Level Security to ensure data isolation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate migration for user-subscription table with RLS"

steps.title: Implement Intelligent API Routes
steps.description: Focus on business logic while Claude Code handles the boilerplate of API route protection and request validation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an API route for processing user invoices. Include error handling, logging, and Stripe webhook validation.

steps.title: Configure the Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Standardize your deployment process by automating the infrastructure-as-code layer, ensuring consistent environments across staging and production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a Vercel deployment pipeline with environment variable injection and automatic preview branch testing.

steps.title: Stress Test and Ship
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform a final audit of your codebase for security vulnerabilities and performance bottlenecks before the client launch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current codebase for potential security flaws in authentication middleware and suggest performance optimizations for image loading.

pro_tips: Always wrap your database calls in a custom repository pattern to decouple your business logic from the underlying ORM.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for every new feature before moving to the next sprint task.
Keep your environment variables in a secret manager like Doppler to avoid leaking sensitive keys during development.
Implement a 'feature flag' toggle in your starter kit so you can deploy code to production without exposing unfinished features.
Automate your daily git commits with a summary generated by Claude to keep your freelance clients updated on progress effortlessly.
content.next_steps: Once your project is live, implement a monitoring tool like Sentry to track runtime errors and start iterating on feedback from your first users.
content.conversion_block: You now have the power to stop fighting the infrastructure and start shipping value. Stop wasting time on repetitive tasks and start billing for high-impact features. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
